name: Crown Electrokinetics Corp.
summary: PART I . Overview Crown Electrokinetics Corp. (Crown, we, or the Company) is an innovative infrastructure solutions provider dedicated to benefiting communities and the environment. Comprised of three business divisions, Smart Windows, Fiber Optics, and Water Solutions, Crown is developing and delivering cutting edge solutions that are challenging the status quo and redefining industry standards.
